fields.name: professional_&_business_services_field_1
fields.label: Scope of work (objectives, expected deliverables)
fields.feedback: Suppliers need clarity on what outcomes are expected to avoid under/over quoting.

fields.name: professional_&_business_services_field_2
fields.label: Duration of engagement
fields.feedback: Helps define pricing model (hourly, daily, project-based).

fields.name: professional_&_business_services_field_3
fields.label: Required qualifications
fields.feedback: Ensures only compliant/properly licensed providers respond.

fields.name: professional_&_business_services_field_4
fields.label: Performance indicators
fields.feedback: Allows suppliers to measure feasibility and price risk into their proposal.

fields.name: professional_&_business_services_field_5
fields.label: Confidentiality / IP ownership clauses
fields.feedback: Important for legal/consulting services where knowledge transfer is sensitive.

fields.name: technology_&_digital_field_1
fields.label: Technical specifications
fields.feedback: Without detailed specs, suppliers cannot give accurate costing.

fields.name: technology_&_digital_field_2
fields.label: Service level agreements (SLAs)
fields.feedback: Uptime and support commitments drive cost structures.

fields.name: technology_&_digital_field_3
fields.label: Security/compliance standards
fields.feedback: Ensures quotes cover necessary certifications and compliance overhead.

fields.name: technology_&_digital_field_4
fields.label: Licensing models
fields.feedback: Suppliers need clarity on per-user vs enterprise licensing.

fields.name: technology_&_digital_field_5
fields.label: Implementation timeline & milestones
fields.feedback: Drives resourcing and deployment cost.

fields.name: technology_&_digital_field_6
fields.label: Support requirements
fields.feedback: Onsite vs remote support drastically impacts pricing.

fields.name: facilities_&_operations_field_1
fields.label: Type and volume of supplies/services
fields.feedback: Quantities and scope are critical for accurate quotes.

fields.name: facilities_&_operations_field_2
fields.label: Frequency
fields.feedback: Recurring vs one-time affects pricing models.

fields.name: facilities_&_operations_field_3
fields.label: Service hours / schedules
fields.feedback: Evening/weekend shifts add cost premiums.

fields.name: facilities_&_operations_field_4
fields.label: Quality standards
fields.feedback: Eco-friendly or ergonomic-certified items can increase cost.

fields.name: facilities_&_operations_field_5
fields.label: Maintenance response times
fields.feedback: SLA-driven costs need to be factored in.

fields.name: facilities_&_operations_field_6
fields.label: Warranty terms
fields.feedback: Longer warranties = higher upfront pricing.

fields.name: manufacturing_&_industrial_field_1
fields.label: Technical drawings/specifications
fields.feedback: Blueprints/CAD are required for accurate cost estimation.

fields.name: manufacturing_&_industrial_field_2
fields.label: Material grades/standards
fields.feedback: Suppliers need clarity on material compliance to avoid rework.

fields.name: manufacturing_&_industrial_field_3
fields.label: Production volume
fields.feedback: Batch size influences economies of scale.

fields.name: manufacturing_&_industrial_field_4
fields.label: Quality assurance/testing requirements
fields.feedback: Testing adds direct costs suppliers must include.

fields.name: manufacturing_&_industrial_field_5
fields.label: Lead times for production & delivery
fields.feedback: Shorter deadlines = higher costs.

fields.name: manufacturing_&_industrial_field_6
fields.label: Packaging specifications
fields.feedback: Custom packaging adds cost suppliers must factor in.

fields.name: logistics_&_supply_chain_field_1
fields.label: Type of cargo
fields.feedback: Special cargo (hazardous/refrigerated) requires specialized providers.

fields.name: logistics_&_supply_chain_field_2
fields.label: Volume/weight
fields.feedback: Directly impacts freight and handling costs.

fields.name: logistics_&_supply_chain_field_3
fields.label: Route details
fields.feedback: Suppliers need to factor customs/transit costs.

fields.name: logistics_&_supply_chain_field_4
fields.label: Delivery timelines
fields.feedback: Expedited services are costlier.

fields.name: logistics_&_supply_chain_field_5
fields.label: Compliance requirements
fields.feedback: Licenses and customs fees impact quotes.

fields.name: logistics_&_supply_chain_field_6
fields.label: Insurance coverage requirements
fields.feedback: Suppliers must include policy premiums in pricing.

fields.name: construction_&_infrastructure_field_1
fields.label: Scope of works
fields.feedback: Drawings/BOQs must be clear for suppliers to bid accurately.

fields.name: construction_&_infrastructure_field_2
fields.label: Materials specifications
fields.feedback: Brand/grade directly affect pricing.

fields.name: construction_&_infrastructure_field_3
fields.label: Site location & access requirements
fields.feedback: Remote or restricted sites raise cost.

fields.name: construction_&_infrastructure_field_4
fields.label: Project timelines & milestones
fields.feedback: Impacts resourcing and equipment hire.

fields.name: construction_&_infrastructure_field_5
fields.label: Safety standards
fields.feedback: Suppliers may need additional safety compliance costs.

fields.name: construction_&_infrastructure_field_6
fields.label: Contractor qualifications
fields.feedback: Grading/licensing requirements limit eligible bidders.

fields.name: construction_&_infrastructure_field_7
fields.label: Warranty & defect liability period
fields.feedback: Suppliers price risk based on post-completion liability.

fields.name: healthcare_&_wellness_field_1
fields.label: Type & specifications of medical supplies/equipment
fields.feedback: Precision ensures compliance and correct pricing.

fields.name: healthcare_&_wellness_field_2
fields.label: Certification requirements
fields.feedback: Suppliers include regulatory certification costs in pricing.

fields.name: healthcare_&_wellness_field_3
fields.label: Quantity/usage frequency
fields.feedback: Single-use vs reusable changes cost basis.

fields.name: healthcare_&_wellness_field_4
fields.label: Service/maintenance plans
fields.feedback: Suppliers must plan for ongoing costs.

fields.name: healthcare_&_wellness_field_5
fields.label: Expiry dates & shelf life
fields.feedback: Critical for pharmaceuticals; affects supply feasibility.

fields.name: healthcare_&_wellness_field_6
fields.label: Insurance coverage for services
fields.feedback: Suppliers need to cost-in liability coverage.

fields.name: retail,_hospitality_&_events_field_1
fields.label: Event type / size
fields.feedback: Number of attendees drives food, staff, and equipment costs.

fields.name: retail,_hospitality_&_events_field_2
fields.label: Menu/food specifications
fields.feedback: Dietary restrictions can increase food costs.

fields.name: retail,_hospitality_&_events_field_3
fields.label: Service hours
fields.feedback: Suppliers must allocate staff for setup, event, teardown.

fields.name: retail,_hospitality_&_events_field_4
fields.label: Branding/personalization requirements
fields.feedback: Customization adds significant costs.

fields.name: retail,_hospitality_&_events_field_5
fields.label: Equipment & staffing needs
fields.feedback: Staffing levels and AV setup are cost drivers.

fields.name: retail,_hospitality_&_events_field_6
fields.label: Safety/compliance standards
fields.feedback: Food hygiene/liquor licensing adds compliance overhead.

fields.name: financial_&_insurance_field_1
fields.label: Scope of services
fields.feedback: Suppliers need to know exactly which services to cost.

fields.name: financial_&_insurance_field_2
fields.label: Transaction volume
fields.feedback: Determines whether suppliers offer tiered pricing.

fields.name: financial_&_insurance_field_3
fields.label: Risk/coverage requirements
fields.feedback: Insurance coverage limits directly impact premiums.

fields.name: financial_&_insurance_field_4
fields.label: Licensing/regulatory requirements
fields.feedback: Suppliers pass on compliance costs.

fields.name: financial_&_insurance_field_5
fields.label: Service level agreements
fields.feedback: Faster turnaround increases supplier cost base.

fields.name: financial_&_insurance_field_6
fields.label: Pricing model
fields.feedback: Helps align supplier quotes with buyer expectations.

fields.name: sustainability_&_csr_field_1
fields.label: Project type
fields.feedback: Different project types have widely varying cost bases.

fields.name: sustainability_&_csr_field_2
fields.label: Sustainability standards
fields.feedback: Certification fees drive cost.

fields.name: sustainability_&_csr_field_3
fields.label: Scope & deliverables
fields.feedback: Suppliers need clarity to allocate resources.

fields.name: sustainability_&_csr_field_4
fields.label: Carbon reduction targets/KPIs
fields.feedback: Defines scope of required interventions.

fields.name: sustainability_&_csr_field_5
fields.label: Location & environment impact requirements
fields.feedback: Remote locations raise costs.

fields.name: sustainability_&_csr_field_6
fields.label: Certification or audit body requirements
fields.feedback: Suppliers must factor audit fees.

fields.name: human_capital_&_workforce_field_1
fields.label: Role types & job descriptions
fields.feedback: Suppliers must match profiles to cost appropriately.

fields.name: human_capital_&_workforce_field_2
fields.label: Number of staff required & duration
fields.feedback: Headcount and contract length define pricing.

fields.name: human_capital_&_workforce_field_3
fields.label: Skill level & certifications
fields.feedback: Specialized staff are higher cost.

fields.name: human_capital_&_workforce_field_4
fields.label: Work schedule
fields.feedback: Night shifts/weekends carry premiums.

fields.name: human_capital_&_workforce_field_5
fields.label: Payroll/benefits handling
fields.feedback: Agency vs buyer-covered benefits affect pricing.

fields.name: human_capital_&_workforce_field_6
fields.label: Performance monitoring/reporting
fields.feedback: Suppliers must cost-in tracking systems.

fields.name: government,_education_&_ngos_field_1
fields.label: Scope of program/project
fields.feedback: Clarity is critical for accurate budgeting.

fields.name: government,_education_&_ngos_field_2
fields.label: Compliance requirements
fields.feedback: Public procurement standards add supplier compliance costs.

fields.name: government,_education_&_ngos_field_3
fields.label: Reporting obligations
fields.feedback: Suppliers need to cost-in reporting time/tools.

fields.name: government,_education_&_ngos_field_4
fields.label: Documentation
fields.feedback: Accreditations/licenses incur supplier costs.

fields.name: government,_education_&_ngos_field_5
fields.label: Delivery locations
fields.feedback: Multi-site programs significantly raise delivery costs.

fields.name: government,_education_&_ngos_field_6
fields.label: Evaluation criteria
fields.feedback: Impact/coverage expectations define project scale.
